steps.title: Factor the numerator
steps.content:
Find two numbers that multiply to $-16$ and add to $6$. Those numbers are $8$ and $-2$.
$$x^2+6x-16=(x+8)(x-2)$$

steps.title: Cancel the common factor
steps.content:
For $x\ne -8$, the common factor $x+8$ can be canceled.
$$\frac{x^2+6x-16}{x+8}=\frac{(x+8)(x-2)}{x+8}=x-2$$
